mapper.sql: id, user_id, test_id, total_score, created_time, is_deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_record ( user_id, test_id, total_score, created_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{testId}, #{totalScore}, #{createdTime}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM reading_record WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM reading_record WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM reading_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM reading_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM reading_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 1 ORDER BY created_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reading_record rr LEFT JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rr.test_id

SELECT rr.id, rr.user_id, rr.test_id, rr.total_score, rr.created_time, rr.is_deleted FROM reading_record rr LEFT JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rr.test_id
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reading_record rr LEFT JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rr.test_id

SELECT rr.id, rr.user_id, rr.test_id, rr.total_score, rr.created_time, rr.is_deleted FROM reading_record rr LEFT JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rr.test_id
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reading_record rr LEFT JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rr.test_id

SELECT rr.id, rr.user_id, rr.test_id, rr.total_score, rr.created_time, rr.is_deleted FROM reading_record rr LEFT JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rr.test_id
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reading_record rr LEFT JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rr.test_id

SELECT rr.id, rr.user_id, rr.test_id, rr.total_score, rr.created_time, rr.is_deleted FROM reading_record rr LEFT JOIN reading_test rt ON rt.id = rr.test_id
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE reading_record SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE reading_record SET is_deleted = 0 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 1
mapper.select: SELECT rr.id, rr.user_id, rr.test_id, rr.total_score, rr.created_time, rr.is_deleted FROM reading_record rr WHERE rr.user_id = #{userId} AND rr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rr.created_time DESC, rr.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT AVG(total_score) FROM reading_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND total_score IS NOT NULL
